title: BREAST AND CERVICAL CANCER TREATMENT - 211info
text: OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION BREAST AND CERVICAL CANCER TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Medical benefit program through OHP for individuals needing treatment for breast cancer or cervical cancer who do not have health insurance coverage. Individuals may ask their provider to refer them to the program. Applicant 800 NE Oregon Street Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: People under age 65 who live in Oregon and: -Need treatment for breast cancer or cervical cancer -Do not have minimum essential coverage for treatment -Do not qualify for any other Medicaid programs -Household income at or below 250% Federal Poverty Level (FPL) Hours: Vary by site Email (800) 699-9075 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (971) 673-1222 Main phone (971) 673-1299 FAX 711 TTY/TTD (800) 422-6012 Toll-free Main phone (800) 699-9075 Ask for the BCCTP Team Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: A referral can be made by any provider who screens for breast or cervical cancer by sending a completed application to OHP. Applications are usually processed by the next business day, Oregon Breast and Cervical Cancer Program (BCCTP) coverage begins the day a provider has made cervical cancer diagnosis. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Medical Care Expense Assistance * Breast Cancer Medical Care Expense Assistance * Cervical Cancer Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES -
